projectDescription: A Laravel 11 + Vue.js task management web application with user authentication, task assignment, and CRUD operations via a JSON API backend.
keyFeatures: User authentication with Laravel Breeze (login, register, logout)
Task creation with title, description, and user assignment by email
Task completion — marks tasks as done and hides them from the active list
Task deletion with instant UI update via Vuex store
JSON API backend (Laravel) consumed by Vue.js frontend with Axios
Vuex state management for reactive task list
Database schema with tasks table linked to users via foreign key
publicApiSurface: POST /tasks — Create a new task (title, description, user email)
PUT /tasks/{id}/complete — Mark a task as completed
